info.title: tailtrails-api
info.description: General API for the TailTrails frontend.

schema.title: Response Get My Collectibles Account Collectibles Get

post.description:
Login using a Firebase ID token. Ensures local user exists and returns token/user data.

Parameters:
    request (Request): The incoming HTTP request containing the Firebase access token in JSON body.
    db (AsyncSession): The database session dependency.
Returns:
    TokenSchema: The access token and user data.
Raises:
    HTTPException: If token verification or user retrieval/creation fails.

get.description: Get all nearby trails for the current authenticated user.

schema.title: Response Get Nearby Trails Trail Nearby Get

get.description: Get all for you trails for the current authenticated user.

schema.title: Response Get For You Trails Trail For You Get

get.description: Get all tag trails for the current authenticated user.

schema.title: Response Get Tag Trails Trail Tag Get

get.description: Get all original trails created by the current authenticated user.

schema.title: Response Get My Trails Trail Me Get

post.description: Create a new trail for the current authenticated user (JSON body only).

get.description:
Get all trails created by the current authenticated user. 

Includes both original trails and follow trails (i.e., history of all trails the user has recorded, including follows).

schema.title: Response Get My Trails History Trail Me History Get

get.description: Get all trails saved by the current authenticated user.

schema.title: Response Get My Saved Trails Trail Me Saved Trails Get

post.description: Save a trail for the current authenticated user.

delete.description: Unsave a trail for the current authenticated user.

post.description: Create a new trail with direct file uploads. The `trail` form field must contain the JSON payload.
Create a new follow relationship for the current authenticated user and a trail, with a review.
Create a new follow relationship for the current authenticated user and a trail, with a review and direct file uploads. The `trail` form field must contain the JSON payload.

get.description: Get a trail by its ID.

delete.description: Delete a trail by its ID.

put.description: Update a trail by its ID.
Update the images for a trail by its ID. This will replace all existing images with the provided list.

delete.description: Delete an image for a trail

get.description: List all reviews for a specific trail.

schema.title: Response List Trail Reviews Trail  Trail Id  Reviews Get

post.description: Create a review for a specific trail.

delete.description: Delete a review by its ID.

post.description:
Accepts a multipart file upload and streams it to the configured R2 bucket.
Returns a `public_url` which points to /uploads/proxy/{key} (the proxy route you already have).

parameters.name: key

schema.description: Object key in the bucket, e.g. users/123/img.png
schema.title: Key

parameters.description: Object key in the bucket, e.g. users/123/img.png
